posts.title: Why Your Google Ranking Doesn't Matter to ChatGPT (And What Actually Does)
posts.excerpt: Your #1 Google ranking means nothing to AI search engines. Learn what ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude actually look for when recommending businesses.

posts.title: Why Most Arizona Businesses Are Invisible to ChatGPT — And How to Fix Your AI Search Visibility
